user_query: flights with anomalies arriving at fiumicino
user_intent_summary: Identify flights with anomalies that arrive at Rome Fiumicino Airport (FCO) for anomaly detection.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset contains alarm events with arrival airport codes. Filtered to FCO arrivals. Grouped by arrival airport and month to detect monthly anomaly patterns in alarm counts. Volume column 'tot' represents the count of alarm occurrences.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset contains flight event details including alarm counts. Filtered to FCO arrivals. Grouped by arrival airport and month to detect anomaly patterns in alarm counts. Volume column 'allarmati' represents the count of alarmed passengers.
